executives.name: Walter Coles
executives.background: Mr. Coles was a co-founder of Skeena and has served as Executive Chairman since 2023. He previously served as President and CEO from 2013 to 2023. Before Skeena, he was an analyst and portfolio manager at Cadence Investment Partners and held roles at UBS Investment Bank and Anthracite Capital.

executives.name: Randy Reichert
executives.background: Mr. Reichert joined Skeena in 2021 as COO and was appointed President and CEO in 2023. He is a mining engineer with over 30 years of experience, having previously served as VP Operations at B2Gold and in senior roles at Lundin Mining and Freeport-McMoRan.

executives.name: Andrew J. (Andrew) MacRitchie
executives.background: Mr. MacRitchie is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry. He has served as CFO of Skeena since 2017 and was previously CFO of several other public mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Walter Coles
board_of_directors.background: Executive Chairman of Skeena Resources. Former CEO and co-founder.

board_of_directors.name: Randy Reichert
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Skeena Resources.

board_of_directors.name: Craig Parry
board_of_directors.background: Geologist and co-founder of Inventa Capital. Former CEO of IsoEnergy and co-founder of NexGen Energy.

board_of_directors.name: Judith Mazvihwa-Maclean
board_of_directors.background: Geologist and mining financier with over 20 years of experience in mineral exploration and mining finance.

board_of_directors.name: Borden Putnam III
board_of_directors.background: Geologist and former investment professional with M&G Investments. Extensive experience in mineral exploration and technical evaluation.
